# Legacy Retirement and Source-of-Record Mapping

## Purpose
This document explains how the initiative or platform interacts with legacy systems and clarifies which systems are source of record versus systems of engagement.

## Guidance for completion
Use one row per relevant system. Clearly identify whether the system is remaining active, being retired, or operating in coexistence during transition.

| System | Current Role | Future Role | Source of Record? | System of Engagement? | Retirement / Coexistence Status | Notes / Dependencies | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  | Yes / No | Yes / No | Active / Coexistence / Retirement Planned / Retired |  |  |
